## Summary

- Initializes the Handcrafted Haven Next.js project foundation
- Documents project purpose, requirements, scope, and limitations
- Adds the responsive Week 02 theme demonstration
- Adds a screenshot-ready design-system page
- Adds reusable starter components
- Adds twelve user stories and work items
- Populates the existing GitHub Project
- Adds the meeting-summary structure
- Adds the Canvas submission draft
- Adds the evidence and submission checklists
- Adds GitHub Project and collaborator scripts

## Validation

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run build`
- Manual review of `/`
- Manual review of `/design-system`

## Week 02 Rubric Evidence

- Meeting-summary document
- Repository URL
- Local repository instructions
- Design and styling identity
- At least twelve work items with descriptions

## Remaining Confirmations

- Actual meeting date
- Meeting platform
- Actual participants
- Week 03 group leader
- Initial responsibility assignments
- Exact teammate GitHub usernames
- Canvas screenshots
